title: Explicit Euler with zero step size is the identity

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: For any scalar state y and right-hand side value f, an explicit Euler step with time step zero returns y.
assumptions: y and f are real numbers
the explicit Euler step is y + dt * f
informal.expected_conclusion: The zero-step explicit Euler update equals the input state.

declarations.name: explicitEulerStep
declarations.statement: def explicitEulerStep (dt y f : Real) : Real := y + dt * f

declarations.name: explicitEulerStep_zero_dt
declarations.statement: theorem explicitEulerStep_zero_dt (y f : Real) : explicitEulerStep 0 y f = y

tasks.input: Translate the zero-step explicit Euler identity into Lean 4 using explicitEulerStep.
tasks.target: theorem explicitEulerStep_zero_dt (y f : Real) : explicitEulerStep 0 y f = y

tasks.input: Given the explicitEulerStep definition, complete the Lean 4 proof.
tasks.target: A proof by unfolding explicitEulerStep and using ring.
